chronic_themes.notes: 397 venues at score=0 as of W16, up from 284 in W15 (+113). No system alert exists. Tom McGay has 28 zero-score accounts. Second Wife (2E087C25) confirmed this week as zero-transaction venue. HubSpot unavailable W16 — count unverifiable.
Life of Chi (BE069D4E) churned W16 explicitly citing double dipping + Ipos no integration. First confirmed T002+T003 co-occurrence in a single churn. RedCat talking point not resolving it.

chronic_themes.theme: POS integration gap as competitive loss
chronic_themes.notes: Spread Deli (W15): moved to First Table for Lightspeed + Now Book It. Life of Chi (W16): Ipos no integration cited alongside double dipping. T002 and T003 confirmed co-occurring in same churn.
8-venue cascade churn. No new signals W16 (no HubSpot/Granola). Monitoring.

W16: Lumen Alley (2nd occurrence), Taketori Fusion, Rice Paper Scissors Fitzroy, Ombre Italian Newstead (TA with offers off). Holiday hours pop-up interaction appears to be a specific trigger. Jira ticket needed.

chronic_themes.theme: AM vacation coverage gap enabling churn
chronic_themes.notes: W15: The Nuns Pool unacted while AM on vacation. W16: Friends & Flowers Cafe cancel request unassigned, 4+ tickets with no owner. No automated OOO routing in HubSpot.

chronic_themes.theme: Partner Portal self-serve gap — AMs manually doing venue config
chronic_themes.notes: W16: 8+ distinct manual requests via ops channels. NCI boost, seat times, guest limits, no-show buffer, boost removal. Limerick Arms (B7F15903) explicitly stated can't enable NCI boost on portal. Most direct OKR1 opportunity.

chronic_themes.theme: Masala Flames iOS dine-in visibility bug
chronic_themes.notes: 5+ months unresolved. Two AMs reported independently in W16 without referencing each other — no engineering owner visible. ECPAY enabling is suspected fix. restID: 6A3A7879-EACD-4ACF-BA44-770D4608CF9C. ESCALATE.

W16: Sushi Mami (discount on total bill), Honest Crust (brand calibre promise), Fress (burger giveaway miscomm), Persian Kebab (no perceived value). Discount-applies-to-total-bill is the most common specific misalignment.

chronic_themes.theme: Customer T&C abuse creating venue friction
chronic_themes.notes: W16: 6+ dine-in for takeaway incidents, max pax breaches, time-window violations. The Last Jar (EC9FABAF) now at 4th cancel attempt citing this. Forno 88: $643 takeaway fraud attempt. Venue frustration escalating.

iOS visibility bug 5+ months. Two AMs independently W16. Engineering owner needed. ECPAY suspected fix.
